description: '''Serbian hip-hop''' ({{Langx|sr|cрпcки хип-хоп|srpski hip-hop}}) is an umbrella term for all genres of [[hip-hop]] in the [[Serbian language]]. It sometimes also refers to any hip-hop music made by [[Serbs]], including [[instrumental hip-hop]], and [[Rapping|rap songs]] by members of the [[Serbian diaspora]], often in languages other than Serbian. Some of the most prominent hip-hop groups include VIP, [[Sunshine (Serbian band)|Sunshine]], p.pop [[Beogradski Sindikat]], [[Bad Copy]]. Popular solo artists include [[Juice (Serbian rapper)|Juice]], [[Gru (rapper)|Gru]], Struka, [[Ajs Nigrutin]], [[Marčelo]],
